summary: Overbooking Prevention v2 Sprint 1 hardening fully verified. All 25 tests pass (15 new Sprint 1 tests + 10 existing booking integrity tests). Room Blocks REST API, room-night locking with audit trail, full-stay atomicity, and optimistic locking all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Room Blocks API (POST/DELETE/GET) correctly implemented in routers/room_blocks.py
OOO/OOS/Maintenance blocks use same room_night_locks table as bookings (INV-5)
Room-night locking with unique compound index prevents double-booking
Full-stay all-or-nothing atomicity with compensation logging (INV-2)
Timeline audit trail records lock_acquired and lock_released events (INV-6)
Optimistic locking with _version field in update_booking prevents race conditions (INV-4)
Adjacent dates (checkout=checkin) correctly allowed - no false positive conflicts
seed_data_creation: Test bookings and room blocks created during tests with unique year ranges (2060+) to avoid collisions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Overbooking Prevention v2 Sprint 1 fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Room Blocks REST API for OOO/OOS/Maintenance, (2) Room-night locking with full audit trail in event_timeline, (3) Full-stay all-or-nothing atomicity with compensation logging, (4) Optimistic locking on booking updates. All 25 tests pass.

post_apply_block.notes: Applies OOO/OOS/maintenance block on a room using room_night_locks table

ooo_blocks_booking.notes: OOO room blocks booking attempt returns 409

oos_blocks_booking.notes: OOS room blocks booking attempt returns 409

maintenance_blocks_booking.notes: Maintenance room blocks booking attempt returns 409

ooo_release_then_booking.notes: Booking succeeds after OOO block removed

concurrent_booking_race.notes: 10 concurrent bookings for same room-night: exactly 1 succeeds, 9 get 409

multi_night_partial_contention.notes: Full-stay all-or-nothing - no partial locks left behind on conflict

cancel_then_rebook.notes: Rebook succeeds after cancel releases locks

adjacent_dates.notes: Both bookings succeed when checkout=checkin (no false positive)

different_rooms_same_dates.notes: Both bookings succeed for different rooms

lock_acquired_event.notes: lock_acquired event appears in timeline after booking creation

lock_released_event.notes: lock_released event appears in timeline after booking cancellation

lock_conflict_event.notes: lock_conflict event recorded when booking conflicts

idempotency_key.notes: Same idempotency key does not create duplicate bookings
